## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore

## Screenshots / Demo

Add screenshots or a screen recording if UI changed.

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] E2E tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Code is typed
- [ ] Error states handled
- [ ] Loading states handled
- [ ] Responsive design checked
- [ ] Accessibility checked
